scopeProgress.name: Backup Command + DB Pool SST Config
Graceful Shutdown + Docker stop_grace_period + NATS Dead-Letter

executionHistory.summary: Greenfield analysis: created spec.md with 6 actors, 7 use cases, 13 business scenarios, 8 improvement proposals, outcome contract, and 13 requirements. All 9 cron jobs confirmed. All findings (S-015, S-011, S-012, S-013, S-024, S-025, ENG-005, ENG-008) addressed in requirements.

Created design.md covering 8 resilience improvements: backup CLI, capture DB health gate, cron per-group mutex, NATS DEADLETTER stream, explicit sequential shutdown, Docker stop_grace_period 30s, ML health cache, SST pool config. Scenario-to-test mapping covers all 13 business scenarios.
Created scopes.md with 4 scopes spanning CLI/config, capture+search resilience, cron concurrency, and shutdown+dead-letter. Created report.md and uservalidation.md templates.

Implemented all 4 scopes: scripts/commands/backup.sh, DB_MAX_CONNS/DB_MIN_CONNS SST plumbing, capture.go DB health gate (503 DB_UNAVAILABLE), search.go ML health cache (atomic.Bool + atomic.Int64), 14 per-job sync.Mutex in scheduler with TryLock guard, cmd/core/shutdown.go with shutdownAll() sequential ordering, docker-compose.yml stop_grace_period: 30s on smackerel-core, internal/nats/client.go DEADLETTER stream + deadletter.{subject} routing in synthesis_subscriber.go.

Harden-to-doc pass 3 plus follow-up improve passes (R29, R30): 10 findings fixed across H-006..H-009, IMP-022-R29-001..003, IMP-022-R30-001..003. Includes dead-letter off-by-one fix, DBMinConns<=DBMaxConns cross-validation, ResultSubscriber.Stop() bounded wait, nil pool panic guard, probeMLHealth detached context, NATS Close drain budget alignment, UTF-8 safe truncation, Supervisor.StopAll bounded wait, panic recovery jitter, health endpoint count optimization. 12+ adversarial tests added. All 33 Go packages PASS.

Certified spec 022. All 4 scopes Done with full DoD evidence. Code-verified: backup.sh exists with pg_dump pipeline, capture.go enforces DB.Healthy() returning 503 DB_UNAVAILABLE, search.go isMLHealthy() and text_fallback path, scheduler.go runGuarded with TryLock, cmd/core/shutdown.go shutdownAll(), nats/client.go DEADLETTER stream, synthesis_subscriber.go deadletter.{subject} routing, docker-compose.yml stop_grace_period 30s on smackerel-core. All 33 Go packages PASS.

Audit cross-reconciliation: every DoD claim verified against actual source. backup.sh:42 BACKUP_DIR=$REPO_ROOT/backups; capture.go:58/133/241/294 DB_UNAVAILABLE returns; search.go:92 mlHealthy atomic.Bool, :273/276/286/312 text_fallback paths, :365 isMLHealthy(); scheduler.go:33 muDigest, :202 runGuarded TryLock; nats/client.go:92 DEADLETTER stream, :150 LimitsPolicy; synthesis_subscriber.go:25 synthesisMaxDeliver=5, :505 publishSynthesisToDeadLetter, :525 dlSubject; cmd/core/shutdown.go:23 shutdownAll() with sched/HTTP/telegram/subscribers/connectors/NATS/DB ordering. Zero drift.

Chaos / improve-existing R30 sweep: 3 adversarial findings fixed — IMP-022-R30-001 Supervisor.StopAll() unbounded wait under hanging connector; IMP-022-R30-002 panic recovery thundering-herd via jitter on restart delay; IMP-022-R30-003 health endpoint COUNT(*) replaced with pg_class.reltuples estimate. 2 new adversarial regression tests. All 33 Go packages PASS post-fix.
Docs pass: docs/Operations.md updated with backup CLI usage and shutdown timing budget; docs/Deployment.md notes stop_grace_period; report.md cross-references all DoD evidence.

Manual cross-check verifying implementation files exist and tests pass. ls internal/scheduler/ shows jobs.go, jobs_test.go, scheduler.go, scheduler_test.go (Apr 22 timestamps). wc -l: scheduler.go 213, nats/client.go 217, db/postgres.go 270, capture.go 364, search.go 929, cmd/core/shutdown.go 153, cmd/core/main.go 290, scripts/commands/backup.sh 101 (2537 total). find internal/scheduler internal/nats internal/db internal/pipeline -name '*.go' = 42 files. grep TODO/FIXME/HACK/STUB across spec-022 paths: 0 findings. Go tests: ok internal/scheduler (5.023s), ok internal/nats (4.014s), ok internal/db (0.032s), ok internal/pipeline (0.258s). All implementation present and trustworthy.

notes: Operational resilience — backup CLI, capture+search degradation, cron concurrency, graceful shutdown, NATS dead-letter.
